name: Personal Finance
description_short: Justice Finance is a privately owned personal loan lender offering cash loans up to $1,800 with flexible terms and no checking account requirement.
description_long:
Justice Finance is a privately owned financing firm operating across the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex with 18 physical locations. The company has positioned itself as an alternative to payday lenders and online-only loan providers, emphasizing in-person service and personalized customer support. Founded on principles of responsibility and integrity, Justice Finance serves customers who may have limited banking infrastructure or credit challenges.

The company offers unsecured personal cash loans up to $1,800 with signature-only approval (no collateral required). They do not require applicants to have a checking account, which differentiates them from traditional lenders. Loans are processed through a three-step process: online or in-person application, validation and credit review, and approval with same-day or quick funding. Payment options are customized to fit individual budgets. The company explicitly states it is not a payday lender or online-only provider, suggesting longer repayment terms and lower APRs than typical payday products.

Justice Finance distinguishes itself through local brick-and-mortar presence, multiple DFW branch locations, and emphasis on personalized customer service. Customer testimonials highlight staff professionalism, willingness to work with applicants who have poor credit, quick approval processes, and competitive interest rates. One customer noted paying $100/month on a $1,000 loan, suggesting rates considerably lower than payday lending standards. The company also appears to offer credit-building support, with one testimonial mentioning assistance in increasing credit scores.

However, as a non-bank lender with relatively small loan caps ($1,800 maximum), Justice Finance serves niche needs rather than comprehensive personal lending. No specific APR ranges, exact repayment terms, or fee structures are disclosed on the website. The company's geographic limitation to DFW may restrict accessibility for customers outside the metroplex. While customer testimonials are universally positive, independent third-party ratings or regulatory information are not provided.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No checking account requirement, making loans accessible to unbanked consumers
Unsecured loans requiring only signature—no collateral or security deposit needed
18 physical locations across Dallas-Fort Worth with local in-person support
Explicitly not a payday lender, suggesting longer terms and lower APRs than payday products
Fast approval process with same-day or quick funding capability
Willingness to work with applicants who have poor or challenged credit
Customizable payment plans designed to fit individual budgets
cons: Maximum loan amount of $1,800 is relatively small compared to traditional personal lenders
Geographic limitation to DFW metroplex only—no online lending or service outside Texas region
No specific APR ranges, fees, or repayment term details disclosed on website
Limited to 18 physical locations, requiring in-person visits for some application steps
No third-party ratings, reviews, or regulatory compliance information provided on website
best_for: Dallas-Fort Worth residents needing $500–$1,800 in fast cash without collateral
Unbanked or underbanked consumers without active checking accounts
Borrowers with poor credit histories who have been denied by traditional lenders
People seeking local, relationship-based lending with personalized customer service
diagnosis: Justice Finance is best suited for Dallas-Fort Worth residents with limited credit history or poor credit who need $500–$1,800 quickly and prefer local, in-person lending over online-only services. The main caveat is the geographic limitation to DFW and the lack of transparent APR/fee disclosure, making it essential to visit a branch or call for specific rate and term information before applying.
services: Unsecured personal cash loans up to $1,800
Online loan applications with fast validation and processing
In-person loan applications at 18 DFW branch locations
Phone-based loan applications and appointment scheduling
Flexible payment plans customized to borrower budgets
Credit-building support and credit score assistance
Loan approval subject to credit requirements
Same-day or quick loan funding after approval
No checking account requirement for loan eligibility
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
